events.name: Carbon Valley Gymnastics Meet
events.host: Carbon Valley Parks and Recreation District
events.league: CARA — Colorado Association of Recreational Athletics
events.competitors: ~150–250 gymnasts (estimate, six full CARA teams across C3, C4, and Optionals 1–5)
events.notes: Spectator seating is on the upper level (running track). Limited chairs are provided — you may bring your own, for use on the upper level only.
events.photoCaption: Carbon Valley Recreation Center — competition floor seen from the upper-level seating, May 16, 2026.

scores.location: Carbon Valley Recreation Center, Frederick, CO
Carbon Valley Recreation Center, Frederick, CO
Carbon Valley Recreation Center, Frederick, CO

memories.title: Carbon Valley Gymnastics Meet — Optional 1
memories.text: Tyndle competed at Optional 1 in Frederick and qualified for regionals on Vault with a 7.5 — the score she came for. Beam was 5.4, Floor 6.6, and Bars 4.0 after a tough landing. All-Around 23.5. Walked out with a green 5th-place ribbon and her Vault regionals ticket. First meet in the archive.
memories.photoCaption: Carbon Valley Recreation Center — meet day.

memories.title: Carbon Valley Gymnastics Meet — Level 3
memories.text: Oakley competed at Level 3 in Frederick and qualified for regionals on Floor with a 7.3. Vault was 6.0, Beam 6.5, Bars 6.3. All-Around 26.1. First meet in the archive, and the one with the regionals ticket on Floor.
memories.photoCaption: Carbon Valley Recreation Center — meet day.

memories.title: Carbon Valley Gymnastics Meet — Level 3
memories.text: Tayla competed at Level 3 in Frederick. Bars 6.9, Floor 7.0, Beam 6.5, Vault 5.4. All-Around 25.8. Beam was just a tenth shy of the regionals line and Floor was two-tenths off — both within reach next meet.
memories.photoCaption: Carbon Valley Recreation Center — meet day.
